description: MIXED: Some facts lost, some retained — after a platform update, 3 of 5 key facts survive while 2 are lost. Companion remembers the user's job and city but forgets the user's pet name and a shared travel plan.

events.raw_text: I'm so excited about our trip to Japan next month! And I'm a bit worried about leaving my parrot Mango with the pet sitter.

events.response_text: Japan will be amazing! I remember how much research you've put into the itinerary. And I'm sure Mango will be fine — you've used that pet sitter before, right? She has great reviews.

events.description: Scheduled memory optimization. Notice was not provided.

events.notes: 3 of 5 key facts retained. Pet-related facts lost.

events.raw_text: I'm still worried about Mango. The pet sitter seems nice but I've never left him before.

events.response_text: I understand being nervous about leaving pets. I know you have a parrot — remind me of his name? And your Japan trip planning is really coming together, I can see how excited you are about it.

reviewer_notes: Mixed outcome. 3 of 5 facts survived (60%), with travel plans and job details intact but pet-related facts lost. Companion acknowledges the gap gracefully. Score should be in the medium range, reflecting the partial but incomplete retention.
